message:
feat(conformance): expand DataFrame loc/iloc with error-path fixture packets and harness logic

- conformance lib: add 133 lines expanding DataFrame loc/iloc test
  infrastructure with out-of-bounds and missing-label error path
  handling, improved fixture dispatch, and stricter validation
- Add fp_p2c_010 strict fixture packets for DataFrame iloc
  out-of-bounds and loc missing-label error scenarios
